summary: Mobile PWA Redesign testing complete. All 12 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified working: 5-tab bottom nav, dashboard-style home, new Matches page, team drill-down, Chat page, Profile page. No regressions found.

issues: 'Made with Emergent' badge overlaps bottom nav - known issue from previous iteration, requires force=True for reliable navigation clicks

test_credentials: Parent OTP: phone='99555666' at /app/login. OTP is MOCKED - code shown in blue debug box and returned in API otp_debug field.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile PWA redesign verified. New features: 1) 5-tab bottom nav (Αρχικη, Ημερολογιο, Αγωνες[center elevated], Μηνυματα, Προφιλ), 2) Dashboard-style home with welcome header, 3 quick stats cards, next match VS card, My Kids horizontal scroll, Teams list with chevrons, Recent Results with W/D/L badges, 3) New MatchesPage with Upcoming/Completed filter pills and availability buttons, 4) Team drill-down with expandable accordion sections (Events, Roster, Staff, Announcements), 5) Player profile with stats (Goals, Assists, Minutes). All Greek UI text verified.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/ returns welcome message
Backend: GET /api/players returns players list
Backend: GET /api/fixtures returns fixtures list
Backend: GET /api/academy-groups returns groups list
Backend: POST /api/mobile/auth/request-otp returns OTP in debug mode with role_detected=parent
Backend: POST /api/mobile/auth/verify-otp with correct OTP returns token and user
Backend: POST /api/mobile/auth/verify-otp with wrong OTP returns 400
Backend: GET /api/mobile/parent/dashboard returns dashboard data (children, groups, fixtures)
Backend: GET /api/mobile/parent/dashboard without auth returns 401
Backend: GET /api/mobile/my-availability returns availability records
Backend: GET /api/mobile/conversations returns conversations list
Backend: GET /api/mobile/auth/me returns user info

Frontend: Matches page shows availability buttons (Παω/Δεν παω) for upcoming matches
